messages.text: that orange slice had more riz than me
in my defense, the fruit got a close up
u zoomed in on the orange not me
i panicked, the vitamin c blinded me
sure, blame your thirst on antioxidants
that line needs a follow up
hydration is temporary, striped pants are forever
these pants sign your community service hours or what
respectfully is wild for how u typed permit
i was trying to sound official, got denied
appeal it with a powerpoint on those ice cubes
